subject.name: Arrow mine train coaster
subject.description: A long mine train with yellow and brown cars traveling along a dark steel track through a wooded hillside, with empty seats, no passengers.
key_features: Yellow and brown mine car train
subject.position: Center-right of frame, curving through the scene diagonally

background_elements: Additional track sections visible in background

lighting.direction: From above and slightly behind, low angle
lighting.shadows: Soft, warm-tinted shadows on the grass and under the track

composition.framing: Medium wide shot, slightly elevated angle
composition.camera_angle: Slightly elevated, looking down at the train
composition.focal_point: The mine train cars curving along the track
composition.depth_of_field: Deep, with both the train and the surrounding trees in focus

mood: Cinematic, warm, atmospheric, premium concept art
textures: Soft gradient sky with subtle clouds
notable_details: No people, no riders — empty train seats only
No signs, text, logos, or watermarks

artistic_treatment.style: Stylized yet believable illustration. Anime-realism hybrid. Premium concept art, NOT a photograph, NOT a cartoon
artistic_treatment.rendering: Simplified surface textures with clean edges. Structurally accurate and engineered-looking. Surfaces should feel smooth and almost low-poly, NOT metallic or photorealistic
artistic_treatment.color_grading: WARM golden-hour color grading on EVERYTHING. Sky must be peach/salmon/soft orange gradient with subtle clouds — NEVER flat blue. All colors shift warm. Controlled and muted, NOT vibrant or punchy
artistic_treatment.atmosphere: Soft atmospheric haze throughout, especially where light filters through trees or around structures. Cinematic depth with atmospheric perspective — distant elements fade into warm haze
artistic_treatment.lighting_treatment: Enhanced cinematic golden-hour warmth. Emphasize mood and composition over literal accuracy. Rim lighting on track edges. Soft volumetric light through foliage
artistic_treatment.edges: Clean and defined on mechanical/structural elements (track, supports, train). Soft and painterly on organic elements (trees, foliage, sky, ground)
artistic_treatment.detail_level: SIMPLIFIED — reduce surface complexity. Wooden beams are smooth, not grainy. Foliage is soft masses, not individual leaves. Steel is clean, not reflective. The overall feel should match Studio Ghibli-meets-architectural-rendering
artistic_treatment.negative_guidance: Avoid photo grain, avoid hyperreal texture detail, no cartoon exaggeration, no logos or text, no square or landscape compositions, no bright saturated colors, no visible brush strokes, no flat blue sky, no cool color temperature
